SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

Class Config

java.lang.Object
java.util.Dictionary<Object,Object>
java.util.Hashtable<Object,Object>
java.util.Properties
me.kevinboone.jgemini.base.Config
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Map<Object,Object>
public class Config extends Properties
Retrieves and manages application configuration. Use getConfig() to get the singleton instance of this class.
See Also:

    • Config

  • Method Details

    • addClientCert

      public void addClientCert(String name, String keystoreFile, String keystorePassword)
      Add a client certificate specification to the config file. Each specification has a keystore name and a keystore password, and is stored in the config file in the form "clientcert.name=file password".

    • addConfigChangeListener

      public void addConfigChangeListener(ConfigChangeListener l)
